title: Countries
description: Create, Manage and Rule Your Own Country
body:
## Core Country System

Create and manage countries with custom names, flags, and government types
Invite players to join your country as citizens
Establish hierarchies with leaders, ministers, and citizens
Customize government types (Monarchy, Democracy, Republic, etc.)
Set country descriptions and display information to other players


## Territory Management

Claim territories (chunks) for your country
Set territory types (Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Agricultural, Military, Capital)
Auto-claim territories as you walk around
Protect your land from outsiders (prevents building, breaking, and interactions)
View territory information including ownership and type
Visualize borders with particle effects


## Economy System

Personal player balances that persist across server restarts
Country treasuries for shared funds
Income sources that generate passive income
Tax system with configurable rates based on income
Transfer money between players and countries
Salary system for paying citizens based on roles and activity


## Market System

Global marketplace for buying and selling items
List items with custom prices
Browse listings with filtering by item type
Manage your listings and cancel them if needed
Automatic expiration of old listings


## Trading System

Player-to-player trading with secure interface
Trade items and money simultaneously
Confirmation system to prevent scams
Country-to-country trade agreements for economic benefits


## Diplomacy System

Set relations with other countries (Ally, Friendly, Neutral, Unfriendly, Enemy)
Declare war on enemy countries
Create peace treaties to end conflicts
Establish trade agreements for economic benefits
Form alliances for mutual protection


## Law Enforcement

Record crimes committed in territories
Arrest players who break laws
Imprison criminals in custom prison facilities
Set fines for different crime types
Manage criminal records for all players


## Legal System

Create and enforce laws specific to your country
Set punishments for breaking laws
Manage legal documentation for your country


## GUI System

Intuitive graphical interfaces for all major features
Country management dashboard for leaders and ministers
Citizen dashboard for regular members
Territory management with visual maps
Economy management with transaction history
Market interface for buying and selling


## Additional Features

Scoreboard integration showing current location and country info
Chat system for country-specific communication
Invitation system for joining countries
Activity tracking for citizens
Border visualization to see territory boundaries
Customizable settings for country leaders
